ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the publication */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information */,
  "paper_url" TEXT /* URL to the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (draft, published, archived) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Funding sources */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the author in the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for accessibility */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for accessibility */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posters" (
  "poster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poster */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the poster */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the poster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the poster */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posters_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the presentation */,
  "presentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the presentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the presentation */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code repository */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the code repository */,
  "code_url" TEXT /* URL to the code repository */,
  "code_name" TEXT /* Name of the code repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_codes_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the dataset */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to the dataset */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_categories" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the category for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "category_id")
)
column_names: Status of the publication (draft, published, archived)
Position or role of the author in the institution
Order of the author in the publication
Role of the author in the publication
ID of the publication associated with the image
ID of the publication associated with the video
ID of the publication associated with the poster
ID of the publication associated with the presentation
Unique identifier for each code repository
ID of the publication associated with the code repository
ID of the publication associated with the dataset
Weight or importance of the category for the publication
